text:
The Mimbo Republic (, Minbo Kyōwakoku) is a country in the south of the Republic of Padokea, and one of the countries of the V6. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 

Background

It was originally part of the V5 before the Kakin Empire joined them and they became the V6. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 342 

In the past, the Mimbo Republic got the Hunter Association's help to send an expedition team to the Dark Continent and collect the Trinity Elixir. The team were surrounded by Ai resulting in some sort of quarrel. Only three survivors returned, but empty-handed and without even a shred of their sanity. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344 

Trivia

In the real world, Mimbo would be located in an area covering several countries from West Africa to North-Central Africa.
